character.definition: (same as 齶) the roof of the mouth, the palate
(same as 等) rank; grade, same; equal, to wait, and so on; etc.
(same as 稚) young grain, tender; young, delicate; small
noises; disorderly or confused sound of the drums
the place where the Celestial Emperor stores books; library
jade; rare, precious; elegant; (Cant.) to coagulate
(same as 䬖) a storm; a tempest
